description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden coatrack with a classic, elegant design. The upper section features multiple curved hooks radiating outward, ideal for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The central shaft is slender and cylindrical, connecting the hooks above to a circular support ring at mid-height, which adds stability and may serve as an umbrella holder. The base consists of four gracefully arched legs that provide a sturdy foundation and a touch of decorative flair. The wood has a warm, natural finish, and the overall construction appears robust yet refined. There are no visible carvings or colored accents, but the finial at the top adds a subtle ornamental touch.
description: A tall, freestanding wooden coatrack with multiple curved hooks, a circular support ring, and four arched legs. The design is classic and elegant with a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: The coatrack is seen from a slight angle, showing three of the upper hooks and the arched legs, with the circular support ring clearly visible.
description_view_1: A direct side view, highlighting the symmetry of the hooks and legs, with the central shaft and support ring aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 0 but rotated, showing a different arrangement of hooks and legs, with the support ring still prominent.
description_view_3: A nearly frontal view, displaying the even distribution of hooks and the balanced stance of the legs, with the finial at the top centered.
